overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a player ascending concrete stairs and navigating covered urban walkways before descending into a vibrant, rain-soaked street market illuminated by neon signs. The environment transitions from enclosed brutalist architecture to open commercial streets with dense atmospheric effects.

events.description: reaches top of stairs revealing glimpse of city street and neon lights through opening

agents.ego_description: walking up concrete stairs while passing NPCs descending in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: NPC descending stairs ahead of the player

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with yellow safety lines ascending through the structure
smooth gray concrete walls with horizontal architectural lines
long cyan-tinted fluorescent light fixtures mounted on ceiling
metal handrails running along both sides of the staircase

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a first-person view ascending a wide concrete stairwell illuminated by cyan fluorescent lights. The player passes NPCs walking in the opposite direction as they climb toward an opening that reveals a glimpse of the neon-lit city above.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian overpass with city views

events.description: exits stairwell into covered walkway with open sides overlooking the city street below
navigates through turning corners in the covered walkway structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated overpass while observing the city street and traffic below through openings in the structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking toward the player in the covered walkway

entered.detail: concrete pedestrian overpass with roof and open sides providing views of the street below
solid concrete railings with green trim lining the walkway edges
view of multi-lane city street with vehicles and neon signage visible through openings
palm trees visible through the walkway openings against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the stairs into a covered pedestrian overpass with open sides revealing views of the neon-lit city street below. The walkway features concrete railings and turns corners while maintaining elevation above the traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior corridor with vending machines and graffiti

events.description: enters more enclosed interior corridor section with vending machines and barred windows
passes through area with litter, trash, and food vending machines lining the walls

agents.ego_description: navigating through the enclosed corridor while passing vending machines and observing environmental details like graffiti and trash

entered.detail: illuminated food and beverage vending machines with advertisements
concrete walls covered in colorful graffiti and street art
windows with metal bars showing exterior city lights
scattered litter, cans, and cardboard on the floor

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a more enclosed interior corridor featuring vending machines, graffiti-covered walls, and debris on the floor. Barred windows provide limited views of the exterior while fluorescent lighting illuminates the gritty urban space.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending stairwell leading to street exit

events.description: begins descending concrete stairs toward street level exit
exits the structure onto rain-soaked street with heavy neon lighting and atmospheric fog

agents.ego_description: descending stairs while following a group of NPCs exiting to the street level, transitioning from enclosed space to open rain

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians descending stairs ahead with one holding an umbrella

entered.detail: concrete stairs leading downward with metal railings
heavy rain and atmospheric fog becoming visible as the player approaches the exit
large illuminated advertisements and corporate signage visible through the exit

segments.scene_description: The player descends a concrete stairwell following a group of NPCs, transitioning from the enclosed interior to an open street exit where heavy rain and vibrant neon billboards become visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air street market with food vendors and neon signage

events.description: enters bustling street market area with food stalls, vendors, and dense neon lighting
passes food vendor stall with red paper lanterns and visible cooking equipment

agents.ego_description: walking through the crowded street market observing food vendors, neon signs, and other pedestrians in the rain

notable_agents.action: food vendor working at cooking station under red lanterns

entered.detail: wooden market stalls with canvas roofs selling goods and food
rain-soaked street reflecting neon lights and advertisements
food preparation areas with steam, cooking equipment, and red paper lanterns
large suspended digital billboards and corporate advertisements illuminating the area

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a vibrant street market bustling with activity under heavy rain. The player walks past food vendors with red lanterns, market stalls, and dense neon signage reflecting off the wet asphalt, completing the transition from enclosed architecture to open urban commercial space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person ascent from a sterile concrete stairwell into a gritty, enclosed urban corridor. It begins by climbing a wide set of stairs bathed in cyan fluorescent light, passing oncoming pedestrians as the camera moves toward a bright opening. As the player emerges, the space opens into a covered pedestrian overpass with concrete railings that offer expansive views of the neon-lit city streets below. The scene then shifts from the open air into a cramped interior corridor, where the vista is replaced by graffiti-covered walls, vending machines, and debris. Finally, the environment closes in further, with barred windows providing only limited glimpses of the exterior under the hum of flickering fluorescent lights.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a stark, enclosed concrete interior into a vibrant, rain-soaked urban marketplace. It begins with a descent down a concrete stairwell following a group of NPCs, moving steadily toward an exit that reveals the first glimpses of heavy rain and glowing billboards. As the camera emerges from the brutalist architecture, the scene opens into a bustling street market where the gray concrete gives way to wet asphalt reflecting dense neon signage. The movement continues past food vendors adorned with red lanterns and crowded market stalls, finally fully immersing the viewer in the atmospheric glow of the open commercial district.
